## Summary

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor / internal

## Checklist

- [ ] `go test ./...` passes
- [ ] No internal-only details (hostnames, secret paths, private URLs, internal issue refs) in code, comments, or commit messages
- [ ] Fail-closed behavior preserved (a malformed/missing effective date still returns `false`)
